calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael T. Sweeney for Rubelita D. Gualberto (Petitioner)

Mr. Sweeney provided chain of title of the property; stating that it was acquired by family in 1981, spoke of various quit claims that were executed. Mr. Sweeney stated that the final Grant Deed that was executed in 2003 was for the purpose of refinancing and not held in joint tenancy. Mr. Sweeney stated Petitioner would like to record as community property in Sacramento County and add the property to her Living Trust. The Court reviewed and returned the copy of the operative deed (Exhibit E of supplemental petition filed 1/23/18) which was presented by Mr. Sweeney in open court. The Spousal Property Petition is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera, Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Feb-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
